creator: sverre.eldoy@modirum.com
text: Actually it seems that it's enough to have some emoji char in your hostname - it doesn't have to be all emoji... so awef🐒awef.domain.blah will also make syslogd fail to log... I think it's the part where it strips out "dangerous characters" that is the culprit,.. Compiling a version without that check now to see if that works.
